name: Voxel Creator
short_description: Create voxel art and bring it right into your own projects!
detailed_description:
Voxel Creator is a powerful voxel art engine that let's you export your creations for use in your own games or projects!
- Quickly create blocky objects and scenes with an easy-to-use interface.
- Powerful meshing algorithm allows for unlimited detail (tiny/huge blocks).
- Meshes are optimized to generate with fewest possible triangles.
- Easily copy, paste, flip and rotate blocks for speedy creation.
- Interact with your voxel creations with 'chips'.
- Export your voxel art (currently supports OBJ file format) for easy import into your projects (Blender, Unity, etc.)
